originalTitle: Fixing GPUDrive in PufferLib because I broke it
title: Debugging GPUDrive Integration in PufferLib and Refactoring to Native Format
summary: Worked on fixing a broken GPUDrive environment in PufferLib. Debugged segmentation faults caused by excessive world and agent counts, refactored the environment into a PufferLib native format, and addressed padding and tensor shape issues.
